programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: When Grandpa Max's engineer buddy Phil Billings gifts Team Tennyson the Omni-Copter - a state of the art flying vehicle that can transport the Rustbucket for overseas adventures.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max next travel to Castle Bishopbrook to visit a distant relative who's royalty, but when Ben encounters a 'ghost' at the haunted home, it turns out to actually be his new rival, Kevin 11, throwing even more twisted aliens his way: Thornblade, Undertow, and Dark Matter!

programme.title: Ruby and the Well S1
programme.desc: When Daniel and Ruby move to the orchard home inherited from Daniel’s eccentric uncle, it seems inhospitable - until Ruby discovers a magic well.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: While in Paris, France, Ben catches Zombozo robbing the Louvre, but when Zombozo hypnotizes Ben to remain speechless, Ben must navigate a foreign land like a mime in order to stop the criminal clown and his travelling circus.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: A trip to the South Pole goes upside down when Team Tennyson lands on the North Pole instead, but Ben quickly discovers the culprits: Solar & Polar Twain, magnetically-powered scientists who want to hold the world ransom by threatening to reverse Earth's magnetic poles!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max arrive at a Native American national park to witness the Ayasha Plinths - an ancient Stonehenge-like rock formation - but when the sinister sorcerer Hex arrives, Ben must battle against a beast Hex magically made out of huge rocks!

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: Team Tennyson checks out a Samurai Museum in Tokyo, where Ben is too impatient to wait out the Calligraphy experience for the more exciting-sounding Samurai one, but when a dangerous Samurai sword is stolen from the exhibit, Ben must take on its thief - the new Big Bad in town, the Forever Knight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S3
programme.desc: During a tour of the Japanese Robotics Museum, Ben finds hero-gone-wrong Tim Buktu 'trying to save' Tokyo from a Dragon, but has Tim finally turned over a new leaf, or is this just another one of his half-baked plans to play the part of hero?

Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! programme.desc: The youth of a country is the future of that country. A series of documentaries focusing on the younger generation of China in which you get to see what they are achieving and what makes them tick!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: On Junior Marshals’ Day at the fire station, Melman gets stuck in a firetruck on its way to a real emergency. With Alex’s help, Melman must overcome his fear of heights to help save a stuck cat, and learn that even heroes get scared sometimes.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Marty accidentally “steals” a pair of slippers from a department store, he plans an elaborate “heist” to return them and learns in the end that it’s easier to own up to your mistakes than to cover them up.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop enlist Cruz’s help to perform a dance for Mom’s birthday. Though it’s hard at first, they learn to put their dolphin, unicorn, and narwhal powers together to create something special. / Kelp, Pixie, Ollie, and their friend Leroy try to help Juniper understand her angry feelings.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Scallop is afraid of her first “tuskist” appointment. Kelp helps her get through it with a song. / Fog rolls in, threatening Kelp’s first Three Moon Festival in Unicorn Land. Kelp and his friends use a combination of unicorn spark and the Kelp Way to create a new festival.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When both Sam and Gabriel pre-order the new Commander Kale comic but the supplier only sends one copy, TZG secretly ferries the comic book back and forth between readers. / When Fawna teaches a silent yoga class, TZG secretly find and remove a loud chirping cricket from the Community Center.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Gloria wants spring to come! She’s SICK of winter and is counting down the days until the Central Park pond melts so she can retrieve a toy she lost in the water before it froze! So when Goldie the Groundhog predicts more winter, Gloria sets out to make spring come, by any means necessary! When she fails at controlling the weather, Gloria learns that when something doesn’t go your way, embrace Plan B!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Alex lands a role in a big Hollywood movie, but his part is threatened by a diva-like bull. Alex nearly gives up, but with the help of his friends, learns that no one can bully him out of what he loves to do.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When 6 adorable hamster kitties get loose in the dollhouse, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box head out to look for them. Along the way, Baby Box learns a lot about hamster kitties, which convinces Mama Box to let them live in the Craft Room.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a school notebook and lunch box, it's Kitty School Day in the dollhouse! Gabby and Pandy head to different classes held by the Gabby Cats to learn and live a day in the life of a student.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders get stuck in a cave with their rival, Magnus, during a race to find a new source of an important mineral.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Frustrated that she's not fitting in with the team, Aggro goes off on her own with Elbone on a mission to save a dragon egg trapped in ice.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Sherman's comic goes missing and it's up to Peabody to find out who took it and why…

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show

Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: When Alex realizes he’s too small to climb onto his new habitat “stage”, he feels too small for his dreams- until he hears of a big, new roller coaster at Coney Island and figures if he can ride the big coaster, that’ll prove that he’s a BIG deal! But when Alex is too short to be allowed on the ride- and his friends find themselves stuck at the top of it- Alex saves the day when he realizes that there are advantages to being small, and learns that his body is perfect just the way it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Chef J tells Ollie he cooks with love. Kelp and Ollie set out to make food with love for him. When various food combos fail, Ollie considers giving up, because it isn’t good enough. Kelp goes to his Dad for answers, and two seemingly different ingredients form something magical. / When Cruz is not his usual upbeat self, Kelp tries various ways to cheer him up before realizing the best way to be a good friend is to just sit with him, and let him feel what he’s feeling.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and Scallop pet-sit Crabby, who acts out until they realize he’s missing home. / Kelp feels like he can’t choose between a celebration on land or under the sea. So he attempts to do both... at the same time!

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When various townsfolk report having lost soft belongings, TZG secretly investigates to discover thieving pigeon Yolanda had been building a nest for baby gophers. / When Ian’s lucky badminton racket goes missing, TZG secretly finds and returns it in time for a rematch against his toughest opponent.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: During the Lunar New Year festival, Alex is bummed to learn that there's no Year of the Lion. Determined to be somebody important, he sets out to become the star of the festival by taking on the role of the Dragon- but he eventually learns that every role has importance, and realizes the costume that fits him best is his own fur.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: Lala, who's grown into a froglet, is ready to finally join the gang on a big adventure in the city! But she relies on her water bowl to get around, and Gloria goes overboard in trying to protect her tiny friend in the big world- only to realize that she underestimated all Lala is capable of doing.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a snow globe shaped like the dollhouse, she notices the rooms inside are all cattywampus and in the wrong place. After a series of wacky misadventures that result in CatRat becoming a craft version of himself, Gabby figures out they need to fix the dollhouse globe to return everything back to normal.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro, Burple and Cutter are left alone in the roost to care for some dragon eggs, but a trio of tricky Slinkwings want those eggs for themselves.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Cutter gets a chance to be a "mom" when a newly hatched dragon bonds with him, and they'll both be needed to get the others out of a tangled mess.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: While showing off their new teleportation suits, Peabody and Sherman accidentally teleport inside Orchoptitron without enough juice to teleport out.

programme.title: The Mr. Peabody and Sherman Show
programme.desc: Peabody invites Shakespeare on the show in hopes of being cast as Romeo. When he doesn't get the part, he does anything and everything to fix the mistake.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Tom and the riders discover the Ice Realm and find Buzzsaw inside.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Alex and Eugene find themselves at odds with Tom and their fellow dragon riders when Feathers and Webmaster go missing during a blizzard in the Ice Realm.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: To bring peace to his kingdom, King Julien “civilizes” a Foosa.

programme.title: All Hail King Julien
programme.desc: King Julien discovers diapers and brings style to his lemur subjects, igniting a fashion war.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Artephius tries to warn the town when an evil mouse charms his way into San Lorenzo – but no one will listen to him.

programme.title: The Adventures of Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Cleevil, an orphan goblin, seeks refuge in San Lorenzo – but, unbeknownst to Puss, he is in cahoots with the Duchess.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Snotlout screws up a mission, he must learn to be a leader and earn the trust of the other riders.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: When Mala and the Defenders of the Wing find a mysterious stranger who looks suspiciously like Dagur, Hiccup and Heather go to investigate.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: After Thunk and Guy tell Eep and Dawn a campfire story of Gorgwatch, a hideous monster who roams the woods, the girls are terrified. After a sleepless night, Guy and Thunk assure the girls it's just a made up story. Dawn and Eep are relieved until they find proof that Gorgwatch is real... and he's coming for them.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Guy invents a primitive skateboard, Eep and Dawn have a blast trying new tricks. But when the punch monkeys want to take over the girl's awesome new skate spot, Dawn and the punch monkeys enter a skate-off to win back the skate canyon once and for all.

programme.title: The Croods Family Tree
programme.desc: When Phil learns no one on the farm thinks he's fun, he sets out to prove them all wrong... by building a crazy amusement park.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss accidentally sells Tim's favorite Football Mike toy at a family yard sale, he shirks his duties as a CEO to try to get it back. But the villains pick up on his one weakness, his brother, and so begins a game of elaborate keep-away.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: The combined villains have taken over Baby Corp HQ, and a disastrous chupie teleportation accident has all the office babies scattered to the wind. Boss has to regain his leadership gusto to convince Baby Corp to regroup, as Tim and Danny share an emotional last day together before Danny leaves town for good.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: With the Baby Corp babies exiled from their office and hiding in the Templeton basement, Boss and a trusted team storm Baby Corp to take it back from the villains. Having decided to retire and pass the CEO-ship onto to Staci, he also prepares Tim for her new life as an older brother to just a normal baby brother.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: When a tiny Fireworm dragon ends up at ICARIS, Alex has to decide between her moms’ excitement and keeping the dragon secret.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: During an attempt to get displaced Fire Gronckles back to their native Fire Realm, D’Angelo makes a mistake by accidentally feeding them Catastrophic Quaken eggs.

programme.title: Dragons 9 Realms
programme.desc: Eugene discovers the Lair and demands a dragon of his own.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or “The Dead End,” in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom. The crew manages to steal a few of the dune buggies and take off into the desert! Meanwhile, Rafaela and Matsuo bust into a secret military base and steal an important piece of tech for Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: In an awesome chase/battle through the desert, the crew goes up against Rafaela, Matsuo, and Sandocal – who are driving the kids’ own cars. The crew struggles to fight back while also not losing the trail to Cleve’s base in the desert. When Rafaela turns on Sandocal, he and Layla decide to work together and manage to overpower Rafaela and Matsuo. Sandocal tells the kids to go to escape toward the Bedouin Shield.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: While Jim and Toby search for dates to the Spring Dance the team searches for the Second Triumbric Stone in the marshlands of the Quagawumps.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Jim is unavailable to do a simple Trollhunter task Toby and Claire take on the responsibility to prove they can carry their weight... literally.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Pixies attack Arcadia Oak High the students and faculty must fight their greatest fears Jim faces Angor Rot which takes an unlikely turn.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Colonel Kubritz issues a medical quarantine that locks down the high school, Aja and Krel must avoid capture with help from their friends. Meanwhile Vex, Zadra, and Stuart have a run-in with a familiar face.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: When Stuart’s larger-than-life ex-girlfriend surprises him with a visit, Aja, Steve, Vex, and Nana join them on a triple date— where issues from each of their relationships come to a head. Meanwhile, Krel, Toby, and Eli discover a new passion: Sci-Fi filmmaking.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With an asteroid hurdling toward Earth, threatening to destroy Arcadia Oaks, Aja and Krel must join forces with Area 49-B -- Colonel Kubritz and Tronos -- to stop it. These strange bedfellows might save the town, but this alliance comes at a cost.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender

programme.desc: Grug convinces The Croods to go on vacation, and they find a new family, The Broods, who live in a solitary utopia too good to be true/The Croods must escape and warn Ahhh! Valley before it's too late.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Gran moves into the cave with The Croods, she drives Grug nuts and embarrasses Eep in front of the first-ever group of cool kids.

programme.desc: In the wake of her grandfather's death, Lucky sets out to show the town his softer side and give him the goodbye he deserves.

programme.desc: Dozer and the crew must find a way to outsmart a clever bully named Blayde, a new ememy who kidnapped George and destroyed the Dozeratop mounds

programme.desc: Ghostbust a Move When Jimmy's dad decides to move the family away from Deedstown, Casper and his friends vow to stop Mr. Bradley from selling their house. My Fair Harpy The Winter Chill Dance is coming up and Ra is determined to be king.

programme.title: Rupert Bear
programme.desc: When Ping Pong uses her magic to turn Rupert's pedal car into a spaceship they fly to the moon. There they meet the Man on the Moon who runs a cheese stall.

programme.title: Rupert Bear

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Feline popstar sensation Fluffy Flufferton is performing a concert at the Dollhouse Hotel, and Gabby unboxes tickets to see her! Gabby meets Fluffy and discovers that she’s afraid to try new things because she doesn’t want to make mistakes—why mess with perfection? But with the help of the Gabby Cats, Fluffy learns how to fail fantastically and be the most fluff-tastic version of herself. For our Cat of the Day segment, DJ Catnip sings a song about the Dollhouse Hotel.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes a tin full of Cakey-like cupcake kitties, she realizes... Cakey's Cousins are coming to visit! For our Gabby Cat of the Day segment, Pillow Cat sings a song!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild
programme.desc: The habitat is celebrating “Sloth Day” in honor of its newest arrival: cool, chill, Lucia the sloth, who just arrived from Costa Rica! At first, the gang is excited to have a new friend, but soon the whole zoo develops sloth fever; everywhere they go, people are walking around in sloth masks-- even Kate is fawning over her! Melman, accustomed to getting lots of attention as the baby of the group, worries that Kate loving Lucia will mean less love and attention for him! When Lucia overhears Melman lament that there’s not enough room in the habitat for another animal, she decides to strike out and go someplace where she is welcome. Realizing the error of his unwelcoming ways, Melman and the gang must try to win Lucia back and bring her back to the habitat before Kate (and the rest of the city) notices she’s gone!

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter’s Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: Russell Crowe stars as Robin Hood in Ridley Scott’s epic reimagining—fighting corruption and sparking a rebellion that turns a humble outlaw into a timeless symbol of freedom.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In *Pitch Black*, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Death Ring
programme.desc: Killers and an ex-Army agent take part in a ruthless millionaire’s annual island manhunt.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: Vampire Wars: Battle for the Universe
programme.desc: In 2210, a crew dispatched to rescue humans from a vampire attack discovers that the vampires are plotting a take-over…and getting help from a surprising source.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Pitch Black
programme.desc: In Pitch Black, Vin Diesel stars as Riddick, a dangerous convict stranded on a desert planet with survivors. Facing carnivorous monsters and scorching suns, they must trust each other to survive the deadly night.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Total Recall (1990)
programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Identical twins – a musician living in New York, and a mechanic living in Hong Kong – are separated in childhood but are unexpectedly reunited years later when the musician travels to Hong Kong for a concert.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Hwarang: The Poet Warrior Youth

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation

programme.title: Love Punch
programme.desc: Talented boxer Jia Yang is caught in an underground fight to clear her father's debts. She loses her Olympic aspiration and vanishes from the boxing world. 10 years later, Coach Li Yue is determined to help her honour her father's wish by returning to the ring. As passion and obligation collide, can Jia Yang revive her abandoned boxing dream?

programme.title: Iron Squad W

It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Gangster, the Cop, the Devil
programme.desc: The movie is adapted from real events. Detective Lin sets up a special unit to arrest the motorbike robber and the crime syndicate behind the thefts in Foshan. In the process, his pregnant wife is hit by a motorbike robber, leading him to uncover their revenge plan...

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation

programme.title: Wusong vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song finds out about his sister-in-law’s affair with a rich man, Ximen Qing. Qing sets Song up and have him exiled for a year, during which his hapless brother is murdered and cremated. When Song finally returns home, he takes the case to court but the judge brushes it aside and closes it abruptly. Can Song finally avenge his brother’s death?

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: A zombie in an upscale neighborhood appears welcoming from the outside, but years of water damage, black growth, and a battered roof, will really put Dolmar, Keisha and Amanda to the test.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Inspired by her friend Brian, Rachael shows how to make her version of a beef and chorizo chilli with queso that is the perfect meal for a holiday crowd, a big-match night or a family dinner.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: After a 1,536km journey, the Earth-Cleaning Bros arrive in Olang Ol, a pristine nomadic village. They build their own ger and even try milking yaks!

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: This roast chicken and vegetable dish is truly two classics in one: amazing roast chicken with all the flavours of a soul-warming chicken soup, without the soup.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl discovers her daughter Lauren is missing. Despite Cheryl's efforts to seek help from authorities and the media, her pleas are overshadowed by the attention given to the missing white girl's case.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: After being falsely charged with murdering her best friend's husband, Jessica goes on the run with her husband. To prove her innocence, she must first untangle a deadly web of lust and deceit.

programme.title: Got to Leave Something
programme.desc: The two adventurers follow the mountaineer deep into the remote areas of Jiri Mountain. They experience a feast with makgeolli (Korean rice wine) and local mountain folk.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Aussie legend Curtis Stone returns for a slow cooked lamb and ravioli cook-along, which descends into chaos as a home-made ricotta derails some contestants multiple times.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Curtis Stone returns for the second night in a row and sets up the ultimate challenge, to create a winter warmer ice-cream and pair it with a dessert.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: Ten contestants compete to make it into the Top 10 in a classic challenge set by Australian culinary legend, Maggie Beer.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: In this two-for-one episode, Rachael shows us a unique take on traditional pesto sauce with a base of herbs and charred onions that pairs with a Mediterranean chicken salad.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Derek takes Chauncy to see a house in the super desirable North Dallas neighborhood. Even though this smaller home has foundation issues, Derek feels it's too much of a deal to pass on.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today's theme is "Hotel Stay vs. Countryside Stay: The Accommodation Showdown!" For those who are passionate about interior design, places encountered during travels can provide a wealth of inspiration.

programme.title: A Nurse to die for
programme.desc: A father hires a live-in nurse to help care for his sick daughter, however, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: Airline drama is at an all-time high and we've got the viral videos to prove it. See what happens when people are caught on camera acting up and acting out. We're headed for the not-so-friendly skies.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: Utter chaos erupts when a man goes on the attack while waiting in the security line. A pilot is arrested for attempting to operate an aircraft while under the influence.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Jake Makes it Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: Secret Love Triangle
programme.desc: After being falsely charged with murdering her best friend's husband, Jessica goes on the run with her husband. To prove her innocence, she must first untangle a deadly web of lust and deceit.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Say ciao with Theresa and the Caputos as the big day finally arrives! Theresa and her family travel to Lake Como for the wedding between Larry Jr and Leah. Spirit can't help but be part of the prep.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Pigs in a blanket are the quintessential party finger food. The problem is, you can never eat just one! These full-sized hotdogs wrapped in soft challah are the perfect solution.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Keisha is apprehensive about the team's next zombie, which may hurt the potential resale. Add to that a bad foundation and the discovery of termites, this potential flip seems more like a potential flop.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo introduces viewers to dining destinations deemed impossible - but also delicious! First up, a trip to Thailand to sip tea in a tree before jetting off to a restaurant balanced on a rock.

programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars — no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.desc: Today contestants must utilise an air fryer to bring the judges a dish worthy of the Top 10. The winner will score a $5,000 Harvey Norman voucher to help deck out their kitchen.

programme.desc: The bottom three cooks from yesterday’s Mystery Box must now fight to save their spot in the competition. Today’s Pressure Test is set by award-winning pastry chef and culinary innovator Philip Khoury.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S17)
programme.desc: The top nine contestants compete across two rounds for a chance at winning immunity. In Round 1, contestants are split into three teams of three and must choose their champ to represent the team.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows us how to make a beautiful, quick-cooking white ragu sauce that she'll serve over ribbony pappardelle pasta, cooked al dente style.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Semi-dried tomatoes are a new staple in American grocery stores. Rachael demonstrates how to use them as the star in her recipe for a pesto paired with broccolini and served with sausage.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Sometimes the best meals are kept locked behind closed doors, but in this episode host Michael Yo has the keys to some of the most special and secret dining spaces around.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S6)
programme.desc: Duke stumbles upon a potential diamond in the rough estate sale. The team ventures out to discover the house that sits on an overgrown jungle of a yard, where a detached unit is hidden among the weeds.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent "Fundue" that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: Enlighten Your Life (S3)
programme.desc: Today, we’ll introduce you to popular "no-interior" homes. We’ll showcase the "Self-Made 3 No House," where unnecessary elements are completely removed, and the "Hide-and-Seek House".

programme.title: A Roommate To Die For
programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: A cancelled flight to a dream vacation sends a mother over the edge. A pilot has no choice but to restrain an allegedly intoxicated man. Reports of gunshots at JFK causes complete pandemonium.

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: A combative passenger responds with punches when asked to follow FAA regulations. When air marshals attempt to remove a man from the wing of a stationary aircraft, he plummets to the ground.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Bagels get elevated from a breakfast dish to a perfect anytime meal with this everything bagel galette with heirloom tomatoes. The spin on a favourite is combined with a chocolate-filled banana bread.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: In this episode, host Michael Yo takes viewers on five mind-blowing dining adventures that push the limits of imagination and exceed all culinary expectations!

programme.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo goes beneath it all to find five of the most unusual dining adventures below and beyond! Dive down twenty feet under the sea for North Atlantic seafood in Norway.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what it would be like to go back in time for a dining experience from a bygone era? In this episode, host Michael Yo transports viewers to a 1920s-style New York City speakeasy.

programme.desc: In this episode, Rachael cooks up a “meaty” stuffed eggplant.

programme.desc: Rachael prepares a beloved family meal of chicken piccata and lemon risotto using locally sourced Italian wine, lemons, and herbs.

programme.desc: After a nasty breakup, Faith needs a new roommate to pay for the home. The new renter seems great until Faith finds that something very strange is going on.

programme.desc: It’s freight to plate in this elimination, as the contestants choose from international destinations to inspire their cooking. The top eight spots are up for grabs.

programme.desc: The contestants have a day to take in the sights of Doha to inspire their fine dining degustation menu when the six cooks still on the hunt for immunity will cook at the Michelin starred IDAM restaurant.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: The Allies hope to quickly penetrate the Nazi Reich via Italy but instead endure a months-long slog with devastating results.

programme.title: Lost U-Boats of WWII
programme.desc: With weather preventing Darrell Miklos and the team from diving from the boat, they attempt a risky strategy. Garth makes a solo journey to explore a deserted island where he discovers a mysterious cross.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team investigates a large wooden shipwreck that could be one of the Bermuda Triangle area's earliest victims: the long-lost SS D.H. Mount.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Against all odds, Disney turns 27,000 acres of muddy Florida swampland into the world's largest and most visited theme park.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Allied air forces engage in a ferocious and costly battle with the German Luftwaffe over the skies of Europe.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)

programme.title: Mysteries Unearthed With Danny Trejo (S2)
programme.desc: From a long-lost keepsake tied to the world’s most famous astronaut to a giant flying reptile that once ruled the skies… Some extraordinary discoveries remind us to keep looking up.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: In Alone's driest location yet, ten new participants must survive in the Great Karoo desert as they face extreme temperatures, new species of predators, and a host of exhausting challenges.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: Two champions return for the opportunity to go head to head against one of our titans. After facing off against a fellow champ, only one smith will remain and be tasked with making an M1917 Naval Cutlass.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century, Bernard Kroger and another upstart grocer come up with genius innovations that help invent the modern supermarket.

programme.title: The Food That Built The World (S4)
programme.desc: An upstart named Oscar Mayer creates one of the most iconic meat brands on the planet. While Jay Hormel invents a meat product sold the world over, which becomes part of a 20-billion-dollar food empire.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: The team continues to chase a tunnel that may run directly below the Garden Shaft and into the Baby Blob, where tests revealed high traces of silver and gold.

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island (S11)
programme.desc: After two years of waiting, the team receives the Muon topography data and learns that the cavity known as Aladdin's Cave may have more secrets to tell.

programme.title: I Still Remember
programme.desc: Chi is a property agent who leads an aimless and unfulfilling life until he reunites with his P.E. teacher, Wong, from primary school. Despite his illness, Wong insists on keeping his promise of completing a 10K marathon to his late wife. Inspired by Wong, Chi brings himself to his feet and finds the courage to cheer himself on!

programme.title: Secret Service of the Imperial Court
programme.desc: Zhao Bu Fan is the sergeant of the government’s secret police. Wang is a cruel and ruthless eunuch who takes over the Emperor’s ruling power and leads the team of secret agents. After witnessing the atrocities committed by Eunuch Wang, Sergeant Zhao decides to defect but ends up being hunted by his friends, comrades and even his father.

programme.title: The Deadly Duo
programme.desc: The prince of the Sung Dynasty is captured by the Chin invaders and guarded by top martial arts masters. Two powerful patriots need to fight the overwhelming odds and pull off the impossible: to rescue the royal Prince and get out of the Chin stronghold alive.

programme.title: Peg O' My Heart
programme.desc: Psychiatrist Dr. Man begins treating night-shift taxi driver Choi, who is afraid to sleep and can no longer distinguish dreams from reality. During therapy, Dr. Man becomes haunted by his own disturbing and perplexing dreams. Are these night terrors the result of repressed memories, or the price of uncovering the ghosts hidden in Choi’s past?

programme.title: The Heroic Ones
programme.desc: Set in the Tang Dynasty, the 13 adopted sons of Sha Tuo King are all renowned as royal warriors. David Chiang plays the 13th Prince, a powerful fighter whose prestigious status provokes jealously, leading to a gruesome family feud.

programme.title: Kid From Kwangtung
programme.desc: Qing enforcer Luo Yi Hu murders rebel Chen Gui, forcing his wife and daughter Xiao Wei to flee to Guang Long Town. There, mischievous Jia Yu discovers his master’s identity as a rebel while helping Xiao Wei. After his loved ones and mentor are killed, Jia Yu sheds his playful ways and seeks vengeance, facing the Qing forces in a final battle.

programme.title: Killer Clans
programme.desc: This intriguing wuxia saga is packed with conspiracies, power schemes and sword fights to produce a perfect blend of great action and gripping drama. The movie centres around the struggle for underworld supremacy between two clans, where the line between good and evil is not always that clear-cut.

programme.title: The Shaolin Avengers
programme.desc: Hu seeks to avenge his father who is being killed by the White-Browed Hermit and his gang. However, he fails in his attempt and is saved by Fang Shi Yu, a youth from Shaolin whose parents are also killed by the same villains. They learn and master the advanced Shaolin style kung fu, before Fang leads Hu and the Shaolin fellows to fight the enemies.

programme.title: The Invincible Fist
programme.desc: A dedicated chief constable nicknamed “The Invincible Fist” is chasing after a band of bandits near a village one day and encounters an innocent blind girl. He quickly falls in love with her, but finds out she is the daughter of a vicious bandit. Will he kill the father of his lover?

programme.title: Shark Busters
programme.desc: During the financial crisis, a vast majority of Hong Kong people experience difficulties in repaying debts. During this time, loan sharks use ruthless ways to force debtors to repay their loans and it is up to Officer Lee and his underground team to hunt down the head of this illegal organization.

programme.title: Cop Shop Babes
programme.desc: Island East Police Station headed by Madam Lui is known for its “Cop Shop Babes” as all the officers there are female. Two police officers, Beer and Satay, apply for an internal transfer to this station in order to approach the girls. It is at this time that the police receives a bomb threat – can they resolve the case?

programme.title: A Cool Fish 2
programme.desc: Scoundrel Chen San Jin and the ruthless Xue Fang Mei, who parted ways on the streets of Bangkok, are unexpectedly drawn into a kidnapping scheme by a criminal syndicate. As danger escalates and tensions flare, they must navigate betrayal and chaos. Can they survive the ordeal together?

programme.title: The New One-Armed Swordsman
programme.desc: David Chiang plays the all-new one-armed hero - a swordsman who chops off his right arm rather than live with dishonour. When the love of his life is kidnapped and his best friend is murdered by the evil gang, it is time to battle.

programme.title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
programme.desc: Young Ai Nu is abducted and sold to the popular Four Seasons brothel run by the powerful and ruthless Madam Chun Yi. Ai Nu gets locked up in a dungeon due to her fiery attitude. Soon, a murder occurs within the brothel and a policeman must race against time to prevent a vicious revenge plot from reaching its blood-spattered conclusion.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory on an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help his other co-workers escape safely and fight to kill the monster.

programme.title: Life Must Go On
programme.desc: When the “midnight gymnasium” programme for wayward teenage girls is at funding risk, social worker Yanki puts together a dodgeball team to compete in a match and save it. With an ex-star athlete John as the coach, the girls realize they must face their problems and overcome their challenges instead of dodging them. Can they finally win the match?

programme.title: My First of May
programme.desc: Former squash champion Teng and his wife face devastating trials when their daughter is diagnosed with muscular dystrophy and his mother with cancer. Years later, as the family struggles between holding on and letting go, they find a new connection through a small but powerful sign of hope: the faint movement of their daughter’s pinky finger.

programme.title: The Bullet Vanishes
programme.desc: A series of murders at a munitions factory sparks fear of a “Phantom Bullet” that kills without a trace. Detective Song Dong Lu and sharpshooter Guo Zhui are tasked with solving the case. As they uncover layers of corruption and conspiracy, they are drawn into a deadly game where the truth is more dangerous than the bullets.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: This iconoclastic film retells the legend of seven Chinese patriots, who sacrificed their lives to defend against 20,000 Japanese soldiers and 50 tanks for 5 days, at a strategic key point of the Great Wall known as Pa Tou Lou Tzu.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Cliff Walkers
programme.desc: The first spy thriller movie by famous Director Zhang Yi Mou, this film follows four Communist Party special agents who embark on a secret operation in the Japanese puppet state of Manchukuo in 1932. Sold out by a traitor, the agents, who split up into two teams, find themselves surrounded by threats on all sides. Can they complete their mission?

programme.title: The Grey Men
programme.desc: Hong Kong police officer Ah Shan goes undercover in prison to gain the trust of criminal Tian and seek evidence against his gang. After their release, Shan helps Tian rise within the gang and become the new boss. However, as Shan cracks down on the gang, he uncovers a shocking secret about Tian...

programme.title: The Fate of Reunion
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago, Green Snake gained enlightenment under the guidance of Dao Qing and gradually falls for him. However, her devotion to Dao Qing caused him to reincarnate and go through the pains of death. Since then, she sets out to search for the many reincarnations of Dao Qing over hundreds of years to help him reverse the situation…

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: Bloody Parrot
programme.desc: A swordsman is suspected of being the thief of a treasure sent to Emperor. Through his investigation, he is led on to the trail of the supernatural “Bloody Parrot”. Poisonous things happen including a demonic possession, witches casting poison spells and disgusting autopsies. Then a dead constable turns into a vampire!

programme.title: Executioners From Shaolin
programme.desc: The White-Browed Priest supports the brutal Qing government, burning down Shaolin Temple and hunting its disciples. Shaolin’s Hung falls in love with Fang while escaping the hunt and the couple have a son before Hung is killed by the Priest. To avenge his father, Hung’s son creates a new form of martial art combining his parents’ kung fu styles.

programme.title: Clans of Intrigue
programme.desc: Heroic outlaw Chu Liu Xiang is dining with his friend Monk Wu Hua, when Gong from the Holy Water Palace appears and accuses Chu of stealing the holy water from her Palace and using it for various murders. Chu denies, and is given a month to find the murderer or be killed by Gong. To prove his innocence, Chu decides to investigate the case…

programme.title: American Girl
programme.desc: 13 year-old Fen is uprooted from LA and moves to Taipei in early 2003, when her mother is diagnosed with breast cancer. She struggles to adjust to her new life with a new school and long-separated father, and drifts away from her mother. When her younger sister is misdiagnosed with SARS, they finally open up to each other during quarantine.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: To save his son who has been kidnapped by human traffickers, police officer Zhang relentlessly hunts them down and accidentally finds himself implicated in a major child abduction case. In the process, he teams up with a mysterious lady to crack the international crime syndicate and rescue his son.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan is a wealthy Kwangtung brat with a good kung fu background, he has only one ambition: to pit his wits against three shady masters of the North. The first, conman Che Tsai. The second, a professional romantic dubbed The Terrific. Terrific introduces Tou Kuan to his third rival, Thief Shih San-shou.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam is being hunted as he discovers that the mayor and the chief of medical bureau are colluding with a drug dealer. He is saved by a fishermen family and works in their friend’s grocery but the grocery owner is killed when the enemies track Sam down. Sam escapes to Shaolin to learn the cudgel style of kung fu in order to avenge his friends.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Asia Trade
programme.desc: Live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud-Watts, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping markets.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The China Show
programme.desc: Your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. Hosted by Yvonne Man and David Ingles.

programme.title: Insight with Haslinda Amin
programme.desc: The definitive guide for global news audiences to get the complete picture on the biggest story of the day, through probing interviews and nuanced conversations.

programme.title: Bloomberg Horizons Middle East & Africa
programme.desc: Linking the market drivers from overnight in the US and across Asia into the region's trading day, with deep dive analysis of the top business, energy and geopolitical stories shaping decisions.

programme.title: Bloomberg Daybreak: Europe
programme.desc: Live from London, we catch you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. Plus, we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

programme.title: Bloomberg: The Opening Trade
programme.desc: Everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. We break down today's biggest stories and speak to guests with skin in the game.

programme.title: The Pulse with Francine Lacqua
programme.desc: Conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, finance and politics. We go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

programme.title: Bloomberg Brief
programme.desc: Delivering the market news, data and analysis you need to set your agenda.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance
programme.desc: Daily conversations with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. Hosted by Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern.

programme.title: Bloomberg Open Interest
programme.desc: Bloomberg Open Interest with Matt Miller and Dani Burger - delivers the market-moving news you need to know to get a jump start on the US trading day.

programme.title: Bloomberg Tech
programme.desc: The only daily live technology program with a focus on breaking news, market-moving reporting and analysis of global technology companies and stories.

programme.title: Bloomberg Crypto
programme.desc: Bloomberg Crypto covers the people, transactions, and technology shaping decentralised finance. Your weekly source for the latest news, analysis and interviews with the most influential stakeholders.

programme.title: Bloomberg: Balance of Power
programme.desc: Bloomberg Balance of Power focuses on politics and policies on Capitol Hill, in President Trump's administration, the federal agencies and the courts.

programme.title: Bloomberg Businessweek Daily
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring you reporting from the magazine that helps global leaders stay ahead, plus insight on the people, companies and trends shaping today's complex economy.

programme.title: Bloomberg The Close
programme.desc: Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld break down the day's top market-moving stories and trading action around the closing bell.

programme.title: Bosai: Lava Flows
programme.desc: The hazard map for Mt. Fuji was revised in 2021, revealing the possibility of greater damage from lava flows. We'll look at what lies behind those assumptions and what countermeasures can be taken.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: The entire Earth is affected by climate change, occurring with a greater speed and scale than ever before. This program uses scientific data and the latest findings to raise awareness on its impact.

programme.title: Time-lapse Japan
programme.desc: Matsue is known as the "city of water." It is home to Lake Shinji, which is famous for its shijimi clams. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we see the lake's changing colors and expressions.

programme.title: NewsRoom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Ito Junji is a horror manga artist renowned worldwide for his intricate artwork and unique vision, which earned him a place in the prestigious Eisner Awards Hall of Fame in 2025. What inspires him?

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood Hida
programme.desc: The Hida region in Gifu Prefecture has some of Japan's most extensive broadleaf forests and has been home to artisans who possess sophisticated woodworking skills, such as kigumi or wood joinery.

programme.title: Ramen Japan 5min.
programme.desc: A whirlwind tour of Hokkaido's best ramen! Why not whet your appetite with the origin story of Sapporo miso ramen?

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Takinogawa River
programme.desc: We travel to a well-known tourist resort just outside of Edo, where day-trippers are enjoying river recreation and forest walks, praying at local shrines, and sitting down for riverside picnics.

programme.desc: Matsumoto Toshihide delivers toothbrushes to children who fled Myanmar and live in evacuation shelters that lack proper medical facilities. He talks about protecting their lives through oral care.

programme.title: Nun's Seasonal Calendar
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about the summer dates of shousho and taisho. The temple chefs teach us how to make two seasonal specialties: somen noodle rolls and marinated summer vegetables.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: Airing Laundry
programme.desc: It's summer, and a group of women have gathered at the local well to do laundry in the shade. We learn about the different techniques and tools they used to wash and dry different types of kimonos.
